name: Affiliate Onboarding — FirstPromoter Code Issue + Attio Write-Back

nodes.name: Webhook — Affiliate Onboarding
nodes.notes: Triggered by the Attio 'PT Affiliate Onboarding' workflow when a deal's stage changes to Onboarded. Attio POSTs a minimal body: { "attio_deal_id": "<deal record id>" }. Only the deal id is needed — this workflow fetches everything else from the Attio API, which sidesteps Attio's no-code builder being unable to resolve linked-record variables (email/name live on the associated Person, not the deal).

nodes.name: Fetch Attio Deal
nodes.notes: GET the deal record. The linked Person's record id is at data.values.associated_people[0].target_record_id (verified against the live Attio API 2026-05-21).

nodes.name: Fetch Attio Person
nodes.notes: GET the linked Person. email at data.values.email_addresses[0].email_address; name at data.values.name[0].first_name / .last_name (verified live 2026-05-21).

nodes.name: Create FirstPromoter Promoter
nodes.notes: POST FirstPromoter API v2. Auth: bound credential sets `Authorization: Bearer <FIRSTPROMOTER_API_KEY>`. `ACCOUNT-ID: qj5zoyxs` is hardcoded (not a secret — same value as the public tracking ID). FirstPromoter rejects a duplicate email with HTTP 400, so a re-fire is harmless — no duplicate promoter is created.

nodes.name: Write Code to Attio Deal
nodes.notes: PATCH the deal: write firstpromoter_code = promoter_campaigns[0].ref_token from the FirstPromoter response, and code_issued_date = today. firstpromoter_code is the documented join key between Attio and FirstPromoter (attio-config-spec-v2.md).

notes: PT affiliate onboarding. Trigger: the Attio 'PT Affiliate Onboarding' workflow POSTs { attio_deal_id } to this webhook when a deal's stage becomes Onboarded. Chain: webhook -> Format Input (extract deal id) -> Fetch Attio Deal (GET, find linked Person) -> Fetch Attio Person (GET, read email + name) -> Build FP Payload -> Create FirstPromoter Promoter (POST api/v2) -> Write Code to Attio Deal (PATCH firstpromoter_code + code_issued_date). Full chain verified against the live Attio + FirstPromoter APIs 2026-05-21. Env-free: two bound httpHeaderAuth credentials — 'Attio API' (Authorization: Bearer <ATTIO_API_KEY>) and 'FirstPromoter API' (Authorization: Bearer <FIRSTPROMOTER_API_KEY>). ACCOUNT-ID is hardcoded on the FirstPromoter node (not a secret). This design moved the linked-record traversal + JSON-response parsing into n8n because Attio's no-code HTTP block cannot resolve variables through a linked record nor parse an HTTP response body.
